title: BEM-845 agreed protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:23 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b844=load('governance/state/bem844_read_843_process_or_continue.json')
paths=b844.get('real_response_paths',[])
source=paths[-1] if paths else ''
txt=read(source) if source else read('governance/protocols/BEM844_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
up=txt.upper()
if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up:
    decision='APPROVED'
elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up:
    decision='BLOCKED'
elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
else:
    decision='UNKNOWN'
status='protocol_agreed' if decision=='APPROVED' else ('protocol_change_required' if decision=='CHANGE_REQUIRED' else ('protocol_blocked' if decision=='BLOCKED' else 'protocol_decision_unknown'))
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-845 | Multi-Agent Development Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+'Дата версии: '+created+sep+'Источник Claude: '+str(source)+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'| Раздел | Согласованная позиция | Проверка | Следующее действие |'+sep+'|---|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Автономность | Оператор не является relay между GPT и Claude | Запрещены UI/manual ожидания как routine | Все dispatch/check через Deno/repo queue |'+sep+'| Доказательство PASS | PASS только при наличии dispatch-result, Claude runtime-state и real Claude response | BEM-819/BEM-820 triad | Сохранять triad-check в state |'+sep+'| Mailbox | Ответ Claude засчитывается только если это не blocker/fallback и есть Decision + Claude marker | Фильтр BEM-794/BEM-844 | Не засчитывать NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL |'+sep+'| Ошибки очереди | Один плохой JSON не валит Codex Runner | Processor архивирует invalid JSON и пишет status | Продолжить hardening queue processor |'+sep+'| Claude auth | Неверный with-param убран; auth идёт через env/secrets | Проверка BEM-840 | При failure читать outcome/state, не гадать |'+sep+'| Непрерывность | Отчёт не завершает разработку | Следующий active task/pending обязателен | После отчёта сразу следующий task |'+sep+sep+'## Claude response basis'+sep+txt[:6000]+sep+sep+'## Статус согласования'+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep)
if decision=='APPROVED':
    next_action='continue implementation under agreed protocol'
elif decision=='CHANGE_REQUIRED':
    next_action='send protocol draft back to Claude with targeted changes and continue negotiation'
elif decision=='BLOCKED':
    next_action='resolve Claude blockers then retry protocol agreement'
else:
    next_action='ask Claude for explicit Decision line and continue negotiation'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'decision':decision,'source':source,'protocol':str(protocol),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_create_agreed_protocol_from_claude.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_create_agreed_protocol_from_claude.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Create Agreed Protocol From Claude | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/protocols/BEM845_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md','governance/state/bem845_create_agreed_protocol_from_claude.json','governance/reports/bem845_create_agreed_protocol_from_claude.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Converted the real Claude response found by BEM-844 into a versioned multi-agent development protocol and selected next negotiation/implementation action based on Decision')
"""
No issue comments.
